root: ^It is a dark night. A guy walking a cat on the street. Suddenly, he saw a new garden.

c-0: ^ The guy goes to the garden.
^Then there is a strong wind blowing to him. Then he faint.

s: ^I have to save him, The cat thinks.

leave: ^The cat tries to get out of the garden. No matter how hard he tries, he goes back to his owner.

CatMaster: ^Then a cat ghost shows up, "Look like a nice kitty got troubled."
^Yes, please help me save my friend.

b: ^ There are three evil ghosts here, one is a rat the other one is a boy. The collect souls for fun. You have to find them and get all the soul pieces back to your friend.
^ You get all the soul pieces! You can save your friend now.

s: ^Go to Hell Kitchen, to find the mouse
^Go to Dungeon, to find the boy

HellKitchen: ^The rat King laughs, "Your friend's soul is here, come and catch it." Then he throw stuff to the cat. catch all of them except the bomb.

Fail: ^The rat King laughs, "Little kitty, go back and cry for your friend."
Win: ^The rat King, "You are just lucky this time!"

Dungeon: ^A boy's sound "You will never find what I hide!"
Ending: ^The guy wakes up when all the soul pieces get back to him.
